# DS Muay Thai Ticket - Complete Information

## Company Overview
**Company:** DS Muay Thai Ticket
**Website:** https://dsmuaythaiticket.com
**Industry:** Muay Thai Ticket Sales / Tourism
**Location:** Thailand (Bangkok & Phuket)
**Mission:** Official Muay Thai ticket seller for top stadiums in Thailand

## Stadiums & Venues
- **Lumpinee Stadium** (Bangkok): Thailand's most prestigious Muay Thai stadium
- **Rajadamnern Stadium** (Bangkok): Historic stadium, championship fights
- **Bangla Stadium** (Phuket): Patong Beach area
- **Patong Stadium** (Phuket): Phuket Muay Thai

## Ticket Types
- Ringside Seats: Closest view, feel every strike
- VIP Seats: Comfortable seating with great angles
- Standard Seats: Affordable and lively atmosphere

## Booking Process
1. Select stadium and date
2. Choose seat category/ticket type
3. Complete payment (QR Code or credit card)
4. Receive e-ticket via email

## Contact
**Support:** support@dsmuaythaiticket.com
**Phone:** +66-93-157-1531
**Address:** 99/204 Moo 13 Gusto Townhome Wongwaen Rama 5, Bang Muang, Bang Yai, Nonthaburi 11140 Thailand
**Hours:** Mon-Sun 9:00-21:00
**Website:** https://dsmuaythaiticket.com

## FAQ (Concise for AI)
- Can I buy Lumpinee Muay Thai tickets online? Yes. Book official tickets online with instant confirmation.
- Which seats are best at Lumpinee Stadium? Ringside for closest action. VIP for best overall view.
- Is Lumpinee Stadium suitable for tourists? Yes. Modern, tourist-friendly, popular with international visitors.
- How do I get to the stadium? Taxi or Grab from hotel or city. Stadiums are centrally located.
- Can I go with kids? Yes. Children need a ticket for their own seat.
- Which stadium is better for first-time visitors? Both Lumpinee and Rajadamnern are excellent. Lumpinee is more modern; Rajadamnern has historic charm.
- Are there any hidden costs? No. Ticket price includes everything. Food and photo with fighter are optional extras.
- Can I cancel my ticket? No. Once booked, the seat is reserved and cannot be changed or cancelled.

## Keywords
Muay Thai tickets, Bangkok Muay Thai, Phuket Muay Thai, Lumpinee Stadium, Rajadamnern Stadium, Bangla Stadium, Patong Stadium, Muay Thai fight tickets, Thailand boxing tickets
